item.title: The Advice I Hope You’ll Never Need
item.description: I survived two school shootings. This is what I learned.
item.dc:creator: Zoe Weissman

item.title: Where Are America’s Ambassadors?
item.description: Around the world, more than 100 of the country’s ambassadorships are unfilled—a sign of the Trump administration’s opinions about the value of diplomacy.
item.dc:creator: Tom Nichols

item.title: The Great Depopulation
item.description: Why is the birth rate declining in every country on Earth?
item.dc:creator: Derek Thompson

item.title: A Sweeping Theory of Everything Is Revolutionizing the Democratic Party
item.description: Democrats are in thrall to the idea that corporate consolidation is America’s biggest, and maybe only, problem.
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Chait

item.title: Pope Leo’s Unsettling Vision of the AI Future
item.description: His new encyclical,Magnifica Humanitas, seeks to counterbalance alarm with hope but lands firmly on one side.
item.dc:creator: Francis X. Rocca

item.title: The National Debt’s Unforgiving Math
item.description: If you’re not worried about this country’s fiscal outlook, you’re not paying attention.
item.dc:creator: Jared Bernstein

item.title: What Happened to Rudy Giuliani?
item.description: No man should be judged entirely on their last act.
item.dc:creator: John Avlon

item.title: Trump’s War Is Staggering to an Incoherent Defeat
item.description: Even the president’s supporters are alarmed.
item.dc:creator: Tom Nichols

item.title: The ‘Vibecession’ Is Over. The ‘Permacession’ Is Here.
item.dc:creator: Annie Lowrey

item.title: I Am Begging You to Read Terry Pratchett
item.description: One of England’s funniest writers is in danger of being lost to history.
item.dc:creator: Helen Lewis
